rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
Use implementation scopes for bindings and assignments that are valid in that scope.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts are placed in valid AADL scopes based on whether they reference component ports or implementation details.
Only include assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they refer to visible ports or features.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should use visible feature names and constants from the AADL model.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless properly represented.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
